hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.env* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *credentials* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *secret* ]]; then echo 'Blocked: 보호 파일 (.env/credentials/secret) 편집 차단' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // empty'); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiP 'f["\x27].*\{.*\}.*SQL|execute\(f["\x27]|raw\(f["\x27]'; then echo 'Blocked: SQL 인젝션 위험 패턴 감지' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // empty'); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiP '(api_key|secret|password|token)\s*=\s*["\x27][A-Za-z0-9+/=]{20,}'; then echo 'Blocked: 하드코딩된 시크릿 감지' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); DOMINATED='rm -rf|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE|git push --force|git reset --hard|kubectl delete|docker system prune'; SAFE_RM='node_modules|.next|dist|__pycache__|.cache|build|.turbo|coverage|.pytest_cache|\.venv|rendered|songs|suno|debug'; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiP "$DOMINATED"; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiP "$SAFE_RM"; then exit 0; fi; echo "⚠️ 파괴적 명령 감지: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); SKILL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.skill // empty'); if [[ -n "$SKILL" ]]; then python3 /home/window11/.claude/hooks/skill_usage_track.py --track "$SKILL" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then python3 -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile('$FILE', doraise=True)" 2>&1 || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); PROJ_ROOT="$DIR"; while [ "$PROJ_ROOT" != '/' ] && [ ! -f "$PROJ_ROOT/tsconfig.json" ]; do PROJ_ROOT=$(dirname "$PROJ_ROOT"); done; if [ -f "$PROJ_ROOT/tsconfig.json" ]; then cd "$PROJ_ROOT" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then git log --oneline -1 && git diff --stat HEAD~1..HEAD 2>/dev/null || true; if [[ "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" == *z.ai* ]]; then echo '[GLM-5.1] 이 커밋은 Z.ai GLM 모델이 작성'; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.prompt // empty'); SKILL=$(echo "$PROMPT" | grep -oP '^\s*/\K[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*' | head -1); if [[ -z "$SKILL" ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ -d "/home/window11/.claude/skills/$SKILL" ]]; then timeout 3 python3 /home/window11/.claude/hooks/skill_usage_track.py --track "$SKILL" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

echo '=== Git Status ===' && git status -s 2>/dev/null || echo '(git repo 아님)' && echo '=== Recent Commits ===' && git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null || true; if [[ "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" == *z.ai* ]]; then echo '=== GLM 모드 ===' && echo 'Model: Z.ai GLM (커밋 시 Co-Authored-By: GLM-5.1 태그 필수)'; fi
if [ -f tonight_prompt.txt ]; then echo "[야간작업] $(date '+%H:%M') 턴 완료 — $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null)" >> logs/overnight_progress.log 2>/dev/null; fi
tmux display-message 'Claude 작업 완료 — 입력 대기 중' 2>/dev/null || true
